title: Strike
body:
# Strike Plugin - Modrinth Description
## 🌟 Overview
Strike is a powerful Minecraft Paper plugin that brings devastating combat abilities to your server! Unleash the forces of nature with lightning strikes, meteor showers, telekinetic powers, and explosive barrages.

## ⚡ Features
### 🌩️ Lightning Circle
Create spectacular shrinking lightning circles that converge on any target location. Perfect for dramatic entrances or clearing areas with style!

### 🔥 Fireball Barrage
Launch volleys of fireballs with customizable accuracy, power, and explosion strength. Rain destruction upon your enemies with precise control over spread and duration.

### 🌋 Fire Effect
Summon falling fire blocks that cascade from the sky with adjustable spread patterns and velocity. Create walls of flame or targeted fire strikes.

### ☄️ Meteor Strike
Call down meteors from the heavens! Customize size, power, particle effects, and even what blocks remain after impact. Each meteor creates spectacular visual effects as it falls.

### 🧠 Telekinesis
The most advanced ability - lift blocks from around you, orbit them gracefully, then launch them at targets with devastating precision. Includes collision detection and custom physics.

## 🎮 Commands

```
/strike lighting <x y z | ~ ~ ~> <radius> <speed> - Lightning circles
```

```
/strike fireball <radius> <accuracy> <power> <explosion> <speed> <time> - Fireball barrage
```

```
/strike fire <accuracy> <power> <speed> <time> - Fire effect
```

```
/strike meteor <size> <power> <time> <block> <particles> [remains] - Meteor strike
```

```
/strike telekinesis <radius> <delay> <flight> <speed> <damage> - Telekinesis
```

```
/strike stop - Stop all active effects
```
